---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool, capability, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or Gap

<!-- What is missing or painful today? Be specific. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- What would you like to see? Describe the behavior, not the implementation. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short. -->

## Platform Relevance

- [ ] Windows 11
- [ ] RHEL 8
- [ ] RHEL 9
- [ ] All platforms

## Air-Gap Compatibility

<!-- Can this work fully offline? If it requires a download, where would the binary/archive come from? -->

## Priority / Impact

<!-- How many people or environments would benefit? Is there a workaround today? -->
